name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 9 Aug 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we are introducing a new widget to help you track your SMS volume data."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"NEW FEATURE","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"New Widget – SMS Volume","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A new widget – titled “SMS Volume” ­– is now available on our dashboard!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The SMS Volume widget shows the volume of your SMS during a specific period. The data includes both sent and received SMS and is categorized into:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Outbound","bold":true},{"text":": Shows all the sent messages (including both delivered and failed ones)."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Inbound","bold":true},{"text":": Shows all the received messages (including messages with both valid and invalid mobile keywords)."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the widget, you can see the total volume count as well as the daily count for the selected time period."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about all our Dashboard widgets, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Dashboard-Walkthrough","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Dashboard Walkthrough","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SMSVolumeWidget.0685g000008yGRLAA2.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SMSVolumeWidget.0685g000008yGRLAA2.png","name":"SMS Volume Widget","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":752,"width":1530}}]}]
